events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario: residential electrical, boxes fittings fill, rough-complete, observed condition: <6 in. free conductor. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Code references: NEC 300.14 requires at least 6 inches of free conductor at each outlet, junction, and switch point, measured from point in box where conductor emerges from raceway or cable sheath. Also 314.16 box fill maybe. Condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Low to medium? Inadequate conductor length can cause improper splicing, rework, safety. Probably medium. Need produce JSON with fields. Need include findings: free conductor length less than 6 inches; insufficient conductor for proper termination/splicing; violates NEC 300.14. Actions: extend conductors with approved splice/terminal box or replace cable; ensure minimum 6 in. free conductor at each box. Rationale. References: NEC 300.14, maybe 314.16 not directly but boxes fittings fill. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70. value? Could be actual free conductor length? Not given numeric reading; scenario says <6 in. free conductor. We can set value to 6? The schema says numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks. Not asked. Could set value to 0 or maybe length? Use 0 default. But maybe value should be the free conductor length? Not provided. Use 0. confidence high 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty string. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Ensure JSON valid.
